string: The operation being performed by a program in AZed requires elevated permission.
AZed wants to use Calendar data.
AZed wants to use the camera.
AZed wants to use your contacts.
AZed wants to use your location information, even in the background.
AZed wants to use your location information.
AZed wants to use your location information while active.
AZed wants to use your microphone.
AZed wants to use speech recognition.
AZed wants to use your reminders.
